evidence_summary: [CH026_SC004] Purpose: To resolve the ground war and show the combined might of the coalition.

[CH026_SC004] Summary: Carter stays with Tars Tarkas to lead the land campaign. After unloading Thark mounts, the combined Thark and Heliumite forces launch a decisive assault on the remaining Zodangan land camps, crushing the resistance despite being outnu...
[CH026_SC004] Emotional arc: Determination $\rightarrow$ Intense Combat $\rightarrow$ Decisive Victory.
[CH026_SC004] Coverage: Wide sweeping shots of the charge; Low-angle "hero" shots of Carter and Tars; Handheld/shaky cam for ground combat; Close-ups of Thark mounts (thoats) in action.
[CH026_SC004] Continuity: Coordination between land and air forces; The scale of the Zodangan camps being destroyed.
